# Code Changes Summary

## 16 Juli 2026

### ✨ Features

#### 1. src/scripts/modules/BQO/views/bqo_home.js [20260716_102955]
**Fungsi:** Halaman utama / dashboard  
**Perubahan:** Pembaruan kode  
**Lines:** 104-109, 120, 140

```javascript
// Line 101:
-       setLists(resJson.datas);
-       setCategories(resJson.categories);
+       if (!isActive) return;
+       if (resJson && resJson.datas) {
+         setLists(resJson.datas);
+         setCategories(resJson.categories ?? []);
+       }
+       // jika API belum siap / 404, biarkan state tetap [] (initial value)
// Line 117:
+     if (!resJson || !resJson.datas) return;
// Line 137:
+     if (!resJson || !resJson.datas) return;
```

---

### 🔐 Auth/Session

#### 1. src/scripts/contexts/AuthContext.js [20260716_102955]
**Fungsi:** Context autentikasi global  
**Perubahan:** Pembaruan kode  
**Lines:** 106, 125, 131, 134, 137

```javascript
// Line 103:
-     cb();
+     if (typeof cb === 'function') cb();
// Line 122:
-         AlertDialog('success', 'Logout', typesError.SESSION_CLOSED.res, handleLogout(cb));
+         AlertDialog('success', 'Logout', typesError.SESSION_CLOSED.res, () => handleLogout(cb));
-           AlertDialog('error', 'Salah', typesError.FETCH.res, handleLogout(cb));
+           AlertDialog('error', 'Salah', typesError.FETCH.res, () => handleLogout(cb));
-           AlertDialog('success', 'Logout', typesError.SESSION_CLOSED.res, handleLogout(cb));
+           AlertDialog('success', 'Logout', typesError.SESSION_CLOSED.res, () => handleLogout(cb));
-           AlertDialog('error', 'Salah', error, handleLogout(cb));
+           AlertDialog('error', 'Salah', error, () => handleLogout(cb));
```
